title: Annamayya police bust inter-district chain-snatching gang; five held, gold worth ₹11.62 lakh seized
description: Three men and two women arrested near Yetigadda Shiva temple on the Madanapalle-Tirupati highway; gang allegedly targeted women travelling alone in isolated areas of Gurramkonda, Valmikipuram, Rompicherla and Kalakada mandals
